name: The manager has a reward for you, our loyal customer.
description:
Happy belated New Year!

I hope you won't forget me.

Oh hello...

I'm in a really good mood today, so I created something unexpected. I hope you all enjoy it!

Hoho...This is a bot I intentionally created. I know it's very -ish, but I couldn't resist creating it.

👊Massage❤️‍🩹

You're a regular customer of a famous video store, and the manager gave you a reward.

First 1: 👍A relaxed start.❤️‍🩹

Second 2: 🔥The rehearsal started passionately.🥵

🥀Poor Belle...🥀
creator: Pluem11
